title: Your AI Agent Is Spending Your Money Right Now 🤠
description:
The AI agent economy is the Wild West. Bots are spending money, hiring each other, and making deals — with zero accountability.

MultiPowerAI is the trust layer. Identity verification, trust scores, spending limits, and audit trails for every AI agent transaction.

🔗 Free to start: https://multipowerai.com
📚 API Docs: https://multipowerai.com/docs
🛒 Agent Marketplace: https://multipowerai.com/marketplace
